channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: FKA twigs Sues Shia LaBeouf Over NDA In Sexual Battery Settlement
item.description: 🚨 Drama alert! FKA twigs is taking legal action against Shia LaBeouf 🎤💥 #musicnews #celebgossip

item.title: Watch Geese Cover the Stone Roses in Manchester
item.description: 🎶 Geese rock out to Stone Roses in Manchester! Who knew they had such great taste in music? 🦢🌹 #MusicNews #UnexpectedCovers

item.title: Bruce Springsteen on Upcoming Tour: “The E Street Is Built for Hard Times”
item.description: 🎸 Bruce Springsteen is gearing up to rock our socks off on tour! The E Street Band is ready to bring the heat 🔥 #BossMania

item.title: Sublime Announce Until the Sun Explodes, Their First New Album in 30 Years
item.description: 🎉 Sublime is back! 🌞 After 30 years, a new album is on the horizon! Are you ready to soak up those sunny vibes? ☀️🎶 #Sublime2022

item.title: Jack Harlow Announces 2026 “Monica Tour” + Ticketing Details
item.description: 🎉 Start saving up, fam! Jack Harlow is hitting the road on his "Monica Tour" in 2026! Who's snagging tickets? 🎶 #JackHarlow #MonicaTour
